meta.title: Why should the Air Force buy a new stealth fighter?? #NGAD #stealthfighter
meta.description:
Let's answer three of the most common questions about why the Air Force wants to move forward with its new stealth fighter program, known as the Next Generation Air Dominance fighter. 

Stay on top of all things Defense by subscribing to Sandboxx News!
